subcodes.first_line: O ye downtrodden ones! Be not sorrowful, neither be ye grieved, and let not your hearts be rent asunder; though heart and soul be made the target [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ستمدیدگان محزون مباشید و مغموم مگردید و جگر خون مشوید دل و جان هر چند هدف
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
